# 404 Error Page

**File:** `templates/404.json`

The 404 page is displayed when a visitor tries to access a non-existent page.

## Features

- ✅ Custom error message
- ✅ Search functionality
- ✅ Link to homepage
- ✅ Featured collections (optional)
- ✅ Maintains site navigation

- [Search Template](./templates-search) - Search page
